basic_details.short_information: Fakir Mohan University is now open for 53 vacancies of Faculty for Master Degree, Ph.D with applications accepted online from 07-05-2026 to 07-06-2026 through the official website fmuniversity.nic.in.

selection_process: Shortlisting + Interview / Presentation as per UGC norms
how_to_apply: Candidates must follow the two-step application process (Online + Hard Copy Submission) carefully. Incomplete applications or applications received after the due date will be summarily rejected.
seo_tags: FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
